fintech_impact.summary: SQL Injection is a HIGH threat because it can create regulatory exposure under London financial oversight, disrupt transaction continuity, and undermine customer trust in secure banking operations.
fintech_impact.regulatory_compliance: Potential compromise of customer and transaction records can trigger FCA/PRA major incident assessment, expedited governance escalation, and formal breach documentation under UK financial-services control expectations.
fintech_impact.operational_continuity: Tampered or exfiltrated database records may corrupt balances, payment states, and reconciliation flows, creating a material risk to real-time clearing, settlement, and end-of-day reporting continuity.
fintech_impact.customer_trust: Exposure of account or identity data can drive customer churn, complaints, and reputational loss, especially where London retail and SME clients expect high-integrity digital banking channels.
